**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Hangdian Feixun Technology Co., Ltd. presents a classic portrait of a 'heavy-capital, zero-manpower' shell engineering proxy. Although the commercial system categorized it under the extremely high specification of 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing,' and its name contains the hardcore phrase 'Avionics Flight Comm,' with a paid-in capital reaching a staggering 14.58 million RMB, the physical engine's scan reveals the underlying truth: this is a sole proprietorship micro-enterprise with a 2024 insured headcount of '0 people,' and its physical address is hidden in 'Room 861' on Daming Road. Multi-million level funds, 0 employees, and a single office—this is definitively not a manufacturing entity. Reading its all-encompassing business license—spanning from 'computer software and hardware development' to 'plumbing and electrical installation,' 'fire protection engineering,' and extending to the sales of 'stainless steel products, wires and cables, color steel plates'—a precise diagnosis can be made: this is a highly typical Project SPV (Special Purpose Vehicle) for engineering projects or a registered shell for a subcontractor/building materials proxy. The multi-million capital is primarily to meet the qualification thresholds (advance funding/capital verification) for government or large-scale engineering bidding. Its essence is contracting weak current, municipal, and decoration engineering projects while acting as a middleman for related building materials and equipment, completely lacking any independent manufacturing capability.
